name: viral-hook
description: Write viral hooks, headlines, and opening lines that stop the scroll
logic: Step 1: Check brand-voice.md for brand consistency.
Step 3: Generate 3 distinct angles (Logic/Evidence, Emotional/ Dramatic, Curiosity-Loop).
Step 4: For each angle, provide a set of 10 hooks (Curiosity, Contrarian, Number, Fear, Desire).
Step 5: Provide Top 3 Picks for the chosen platform.
Step 6: Finalize with a Psychology Breakdown for the attention trigger.

parameter_validation.emotion: Curiosity, fear, desire, anger, or inspiration
